name: appstore-precheck
description: Read-only iOS App Store pre-submission check, packaged as a portable Agent Skill / Claude Code plugin.
author: Berkay Turk (https://github.com/berkayturk)

scripts.lint: bash -n skills/appstore-precheck/scripts/scan.sh && bash -n skills/appstore-precheck/scripts/verdict.sh && bash -n skills/appstore-precheck/scripts/phase2-precheck.sh && bash -n hooks/fastlane-guard.sh && bash -n install.sh && bash -n tests/run.sh && bash -n tests/all.sh && bash -n tests/test-verdict.sh && bash -n tests/test-guard.sh && bash -n tests/test-config.sh && bash -n tests/test-install.sh && bash -n tests/test-phase2.sh
